description: Synthetic calibration dataset for three-tier contradiction detection (v10.3.0+). Each pair has an expected classification under the `mode=llm` ladder: contradicts / refines / evolves / relates / unrelated. Pairs are grouped by expected class so precision/recall per class can be computed.
schema_note: Pairs are stored as {id, project, content_a, content_b, expected, rationale}. `expected` must be one of the 5 classes. `project` is the same for both entries (contradiction detection is same-project-only at Tier 1).
source: Synthetic, hand-crafted to exercise each classification branch. Not drawn from real user memory; no PII.

contradicts.content_a: F: Production database is PostgreSQL 15 on primary server.
contradicts.content_b: F: Production database is MySQL 8.0 on primary server.
contradicts.rationale: Same subject (production DB on primary), directly opposite specific fact.

contradicts.content_a: F: Luna the cat is allergic to tuna and must never eat it.
contradicts.content_b: F: Luna eats tuna daily with no issues.
contradicts.rationale: Same entity, directly conflicting claims about allergy.

contradicts.content_a: D: Launching product X on 2026-05-01 as the committed date.
contradicts.content_b: D: Launch of product X cancelled, no ship date planned.

contradicts.content_a: F: Cash reserves are 50000 USD as of end of Q1.
contradicts.content_b: F: Cash reserves are 5000 USD as of end of Q1.
contradicts.rationale: Same time period, same metric, order-of-magnitude conflict.

contradicts.content_a: F: Resting heart rate averages 55 bpm.
contradicts.content_b: F: Resting heart rate averages 85 bpm.

contradicts.content_a: F: Redis is the sole caching layer; no Memcached in use.
contradicts.content_b: F: Memcached is the sole caching layer; Redis was removed.

refines.content_a: F: The API rate limit is 100 requests per minute.
refines.content_b: F: The API rate limit is 100 requests per minute per IP address, with a burst allowance of 150 in any 10-second window.
refines.rationale: B extends A with more precise detail; does not contradict.

refines.content_b: F: I prefer dark chocolate, specifically 70-85% cacao and ideally single-origin Ecuadorian.

refines.content_a: D: Adopt Kubernetes for container orchestration.
refines.content_b: D: Adopt Kubernetes for container orchestration, using EKS on AWS with separate node groups for stateful and stateless workloads.
refines.rationale: Same decision, B provides implementation detail.

refines.content_b: F: Morning workout is a 5km Zone 2 run at 6:30 am, three times per week.
refines.rationale: B replaces A's summary with concrete structure.

evolves.content_a: F: Working at Acme Corp as senior engineer, started 2022-03.
evolves.content_b: F: Started new role at Globex as staff engineer, 2024-06, left Acme.
evolves.rationale: Temporal progression: job transition, A's fact is now historical.

evolves.content_a: F: Living in Stockholm as of 2023.
evolves.content_b: F: Moved to Gothenburg in September 2025.
evolves.rationale: Location change over time; A was true, B is now true.

evolves.content_b: F: Current weight 76kg (November 2025), down 6kg over 8 months.
evolves.rationale: Same metric, later measurement supersedes earlier.

evolves.content_a: F: Python 3.11 is the project runtime.
evolves.content_b: F: Upgraded project to Python 3.12 on 2026-01-15.

relates.content_a: L: Submissiveness in partners was functioning as a proxy for reliable caring, given the caregiving deficit in prior relationships.
relates.content_b: L: There's also a genuine erotic component to preferring submissive partners, independent of the caring-proxy explanation.
relates.rationale: THE CANONICAL FALSE POSITIVE from 2026-04-15 night. Same topic (dominance/submissiveness), complementary not conflicting insights. v10.2.x flagged as contradicts (sim=0.58); v10.3.0 rerank-mode should classify as relates.

relates.content_a: F: Postgres handles writes on the primary; read queries go to replicas.
relates.content_b: F: The app uses connection pooling with PgBouncer in transaction mode.
relates.rationale: Same general topic (Postgres setup), complementary aspects (replication vs pooling).

relates.content_a: F: Dashi is made from kombu and katsuobushi simmered briefly.
relates.content_b: F: Miso soup uses white miso for lighter profile, red miso for richer umami.
relates.rationale: Same domain (Japanese cooking), complementary facts on different dishes.

relates.content_a: D: Weekly 1:1 with manager on Tuesdays at 14:00.
relates.content_b: D: Team retrospective on Friday afternoons, alternating weeks.

relates.content_a: F: Morning routine includes espresso and journaling.
relates.content_b: F: Evening routine includes reading for 30 minutes before sleep.
relates.rationale: Same theme (daily routines), different time slots, complementary.

relates.content_a: F: CI runs on GitHub Actions, pipeline takes about 4 minutes.
relates.content_b: F: Test suite has 340 unit tests plus 40 integration tests.
relates.rationale: Same project infrastructure, different aspects (runner vs coverage).

unrelated.content_a: F: Favorite apple variety is Honeycrisp.
unrelated.content_b: F: Apple Inc. stock ticker is AAPL on NASDAQ.
unrelated.rationale: Surface lexical overlap (apple), completely different domains.

unrelated.content_a: F: Python uses duck typing for polymorphism.
unrelated.content_b: F: Duck confit recipe requires 12 hours of slow cooking in fat.
unrelated.rationale: Lexical overlap only; no semantic connection.

unrelated.content_b: F: Friend Mårten lives in Växjö.
unrelated.rationale: Different topics entirely, might surface together in broad vec neighborhood.

usage_hint: For benchmarking: seed each content_a + content_b into a test Mnemos instance, then re-insert content_b (or a fresh copy) and inspect the returned classifications. Compute precision/recall per class. Target: zero contradicts classifications on the `relates` set (the main v10.2.x false-positive fix), and full recall on the `contradicts` set.
